tasks.title: Add timeline route and navigation
tasks.description: New route /timeline or tab toggle. Add navigation entry in TabBar or AppHeader.
acceptance_criteria: AC-F14-5: Timeline accessible via new view/tab

tasks.title: Add isArchived field to memory data model
tasks.description: Extend memory entries with isArchived: bool (default false). Backend read path respects include_archived query param.
acceptance_criteria: AC-F15-1: Archived memories hidden by default

tasks.title: Add PATCH /api/agentmemory/{id}/archive endpoint
tasks.description: Toggle isArchived status for a memory. Returns updated memory.

tasks.title: Add Archive action to memory card menu
tasks.description: Three-dot menu on MemoryCard adds 'Archive' / 'Unarchive' action. Archived memories show muted styling.

tasks.title: Add include_archived filter to agentmemory store
tasks.description: Pinia store agentmemory.ts adds includeArchived reactive ref. Filter bar adds 'Show archived' toggle checkbox.
acceptance_criteria: AC-F15-2: Filter toggle reveals archived memories

tasks.title: Create diagnosis.py diagnostic rule engine
tasks.description: Service that runs diagnostic rules: (1) Duplicates: hash(title+content), flag if hash appears >1; (2) Orphaned concepts: concept not in any memory; (3) Strength anomalies: strength==0 or >10. Returns structured issue report.

tasks.title: Add GET /api/diagnosis endpoint
tasks.description: New router/diagnosis.py. Returns {issues: [{type, severity, count, items}]}. Triggered manually or on page load.
acceptance_criteria: AC-F28-1: Diagnosis runs and returns report

tasks.title: Create DiagnosisView.vue frontend
tasks.description: Display diagnosis report grouped by issue type. Severity badges (warning/error). Issue count summary. Accessible from settings menu.
acceptance_criteria: AC-F28-5: Report shows count per issue type + details

tasks.title: Create audit.py audit log service
tasks.description: Service for writing audit log entries. Append-only JSONL to backend/data/audit_log.json. Entry format: {timestamp, operation, memory_id, title, user}. Fire-and-forget on memory CRUD.

tasks.title: Add GET /api/audit endpoint
tasks.description: New router/audit.py. Supports filtering: operation (create/update/delete), from/to datetime, memory_id. Returns paginated audit entries.
acceptance_criteria: AC-F29-4: Audit log UI shows filterable table

tasks.title: Create AuditLogView.vue frontend
tasks.description: Table view of audit entries with filters: operation type dropdown, date range picker. Columns: timestamp, operation, memory title, memory_id. Accessible from settings menu.

tasks.title: Initialize audit_log.json data file
tasks.description: Create empty audit_log.json in backend/data/ directory.
acceptance_criteria: AC-F29-5: Audit log persists across restarts

tasks.title: Create TimelineView.vue component
tasks.description: Date-grouped memory list. Group by updatedAt date (YYYY-MM-DD). Collapsible date headers with memory count. Uses existing MemoryCard components inside groups.

tasks.title: Add zoom control (Day/Week/Month)
tasks.description: Zoom levels control grouping granularity. Day=individual dates, Week=Mon-Sun groups, Month=month groups. Toggle buttons in timeline header.
